description:
Three surgeries in src/types.rs that together close ~5 warnings and shrink the type-API surface.

## 1. Move test utilities into #[cfg(test)] mod tests

These three associated fns warn as dead-code because their ONLY consumers are inside src/types.rs's #[cfg(test)] mod tests block (~30+ call sites across union/intersection/subtype tests):

- BasicBits::raw (src/types.rs:49)
- Descr::atom_top (src/types.rs:258)
- Descr::str_t (src/types.rs:292)

Don't gate them with #[cfg(test)] — that leaves production-shaped methods on the type with a cfg attribute, which is a smell. Instead, move them into mod tests as free helper fns:

```rust
#[cfg(test)]
mod tests {
    use super::*;

    fn atom_top() -> Descr { /* existing body */ }
    fn str_t() -> Descr { /* existing body */ }
    fn raw(b: BasicBits) -> u32 { b.0 }
    // ...
}
```

Test call sites change from `Descr::atom_top()` to `atom_top()` and from `b.raw()` to `raw(b)`. Mechanical rewrite; cargo test verifies.

## 2. Delete BasicBits::from_raw

Zero callers anywhere (confirmed by grep). Pure dead code.

## 3. Drop MapKey::Bool and MapKey::Nil

After fz-ul4.11.25.2 deletes expr_to_map_key and pattern_to_map_key (the only constructors), these variants are unreachable. Delete them along with their two arms in format_map_key (src/types.rs:891-892).

Blocked by: fz-ul4.11.25.2 (must run after the typer orphan deletion).

## Deliverable

- API surface of Descr / BasicBits shrinks to what the live pipeline uses.
- Test conveniences are visibly test-scoped.
- Net -5 warnings.
- One commit.
title: Move test-only type helpers into mod tests; drop MapKey::Bool/Nil + from_raw
